zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Isabel De Bradbourne於1427年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾拉特可利福 奧 素亞時，她的父親Henry De Bradbourne33歲，母親Margery Baggott29歲。她於1456年3月18日與Sir John Babington High Sheriff of Derbyshire, Baron of Kingston在英國德比夏爾德瑟其可結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和10個女兒的父母。她去世於1486年3月18日在她的家鄉享年59歲，埋葬在英國諾廷加姆爾拉特可利福 奧 素亞。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Isabel De Bradbourne于1427年出生在英国諾廷加姆爾拉特可利福 奧 素亞时，她的父亲Henry De Bradbourne33岁，母亲Margery Baggott29岁。她于1456年3月18日与Sir John Babington High Sheriff of Derbyshire, Baron of Kingston在英国德比夏爾德瑟其可结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和10个女儿的父母。她去世于1486年3月18日在她的家乡享年59岁，埋葬在英国諾廷加姆爾拉特可利福 奧 素亞。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bradbourne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Bradburn
meanings: English: habitational name from Bradbourne in Derbyshire or occasionally from Brabourne in Kent, both named with Old English brād ‘broad’ + burna ‘stream’.

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Isabel De Bradbourne was born in 1427, in Ratcliffe on Soar, Nottinghamshire, England, her father, Henry De Bradbourne, was 33 and her mother, Margery Baggott, was 29. She married Sir John Babington High Sheriff of Derbyshire, Baron of Kingston on 18 March 1456, in Dethick, Derbyshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 10 daughters. She died on 18 March 1486, in her hometown, at the age of 59, and was buried in Ratcliffe on Soar, Nottinghamshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Isabel De Bradbourne est née en 1427, à Ratcliffe on Soar, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Henry De Bradbourne, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Margery Baggott, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Babington High Sheriff of Derbyshire, Baron of Kingston le 18 mars 1456, à Dethick, Derbyshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 10 filles. Elle est décédée le 18 mars 1486, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterrée à Ratcliffe on Soar, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Isabel De Bradbourne 1427 in Ratcliffe on Soar, Nottinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry De Bradbourne 33 und ihre Mutter Margery Baggott 29. Sie hat am 18. März 1456 in Dethick, Derbyshire, England Sir John Babington High Sheriff of Derbyshire, Baron of Kingston geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 10 Töchter. Sie starb am 18. März 1486 im Alter von 59 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Ratcliffe on Soar, Nottinghamshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Isabel De Bradbourne è nata il nel 1427 nel Ratcliffe on Soar, Nottinghamshire, England, sua padre, Henry De Bradbourne, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Margery Baggott, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Babington High Sheriff of Derbyshire, Baron of Kingston il 18 marzo 1456, nel Dethick, Derbyshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 10 figlie. Morì il 18 marzo 1486, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolta a Ratcliffe on Soar, Nottinghamshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Isabel De Bradbourneが1427年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアラトクリフ オン ソアルで生まれた時，父Henry De Bradbourneは33歳，母Margery Baggottは29歳であった。1456年3月18日にイギリスデルブイシュアイアデスイックでSir John Babington High Sheriff of Derbyshire, Baron of Kingstonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と10人の娘の親であった。彼女は1486年3月18日に故郷で59歳で死去し，イギリスノッティンガムシュアイアラトクリフ オン ソアルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Isabel De Bradbourne(이)가 1427년 영국 노틴그함실르 라트클리프  소르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry De Bradbourne(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margery Baggott(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1456년 3월 18일 영국 더비실르 데스이크에서 Sir John Babington High Sheriff of Derbyshire, Baron of Kingston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 열 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1486년 3월 18일 그녀의 고향에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노틴그함실르 라트클리프  소르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Isabel De Bradbourne nasceu em 1427, em Ratcliffe on Soar, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry De Bradbourne, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Margery Baggott, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Babington High Sheriff of Derbyshire, Baron of Kingston em 18 de março de 1456, em Dethick, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 10 filhas. Ela faleceu em 18 de março de 1486, em sua cidade natal, com 59 anos, e foi sepultada em Ratcliffe on Soar, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Isabel De Bradbourne родилась в 1427 г. в местности ратклифф он соар, ноттингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Henry De Bradbourne было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Margery Baggott, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Babington High Sheriff of Derbyshire, Baron of Kingston 18 марта 1456 г. в местности детикк, дирбишир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 10 дочерей. Она умерла 18 марта 1486 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 59 лет и была похоронена в местности ратклифф он соар, ноттингхамшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Isabel De Bradbourne nació en 1427, en Ratcliffe on Soar, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry De Bradbourne, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Margery Baggott, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Sir John Babington High Sheriff of Derbyshire, Baron of Kingston el 18 de marzo de 1456, en Dethick, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 10 hijas. Murió el 18 de marzo de 1486, en su pueblo, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultada en Ratcliffe on Soar, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra.
